channel.title: Jayesh Suryavanshi — Writing
channel.description: Technical studies and field notes on machine learning, LLM agents, and the models I take apart.

item.title: The open-weights frontier, mid-2026
item.description: Inkling vs GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, DeepSeek V4, and Nemotron 3 Ultra — a benchmark-checked field guide to who actually wins what, and how far the open tier has closed the gap to the closed frontier.

item.title: Inkling, up close
item.description: A close read of Thinking Machines Lab's 975B open-weights multimodal MoE — what's actually new in the architecture, where it really lands on benchmarks, the real-time system it was built for, and how I'd fine-tune it on Tinker.
